title: Global Payments: Undervalued With Fintech Industry Tailwinds
text: Global Payments is a Fortune 500 payment solutions provider, which works with a range of businesses from SMBs to large enterprises. The company reported solid financial results for the third quarter of 2022, as it beat revenue estimates and reported inline with adjusted earnings estimates.

title: Our Top Growth Idea For 2023: Global Payments
text: Global Payments operates in an industry with exceptionally high margins, solid organic growth and free cash flow. The stock is off over 60% from its highs in late 2021, and now trades at a bargain 9x forward 2023 earnings (lowest in its history).

title: These Will Be The Best 10 Stocks In 2023, Analysts Say
text: Phew. The S&P 500's horrible year that was 2022 is finally just about over. And analysts have picked their favorite spots.

title: 5 Financial Transaction Stocks in Focus Despite Industry Woes
text: The widespread adoption of contactless payment methods and a favorable consumer spending level might drive the Financial Transaction Services space. However, high technology investments will dampen the bottom line.
